query: write a code to Run the sample from 100K to 150 K and 200K to 300K with 400 second exposure time
preview:
```spec 
 define run_sample 
   set sample_position 100K 
   repeat 5 
     wait 400s 
     increment sample_position 50K 
   endrepeat 
  
   set sample_position 200K 
   repeat 3 
     wait 400s 
     increment sample_position 100K 
   endrepeat 
 enddefine 
  
 run_sample 
 ```
